Mixed martial arts events
2026 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki
Information
First dateJanuary 17, 2026
Events
Fights
Chronology
2025 in KSW 2026 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2027 in KSW

The year 2026 will be the 22nd year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Title Date Arena Location
1 XTB KSW 114: Parnasse vs. Held Jan 17, 2026 Radomskie Centrum Sportu Radom, Poland
2 XTB KSW 115: Przybysz vs. Yakymenko Feb 21, 2026 RCS Lubin Lubin, Poland
3 XTB KSW 116: Bartosiński vs. Fleminas Mar 14, 2026 Arena Gorzów Gorzów Wielkopolski, Poland
4 XTB KSW 117: Pawlak vs. Khalidov Apr 18, 2026 Arena COS Torwar Warsaw, Poland
5 XTB KSW 118: Kuberski vs. Michalski May 16, 2026 Kalisz Arena Kalisz, Poland
6 XTB KSW 119: Kaczmarczyk vs. Brichta Jun 20, 2026 Radomskie Centrum Sportu Radom, Poland
7 XTB KSW 120: Szpilka vs. Sakai Jul 18, 2026 Polsat Plus Arena Gdynia, Poland

XTB KSW 114: Parnasse vs. Held

[edit]
XTB KSW 114: Parnasse vs. Held
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJanuary 17, 2026
VenueRadom Sports Center
CityRadom, Poland

XTB KSW 114: Parnasse vs. Held was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on January 17, 2026, at the Radom Sports Center in Radom, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's fourth visit to Radom and first since KSW 102 in January 2025.[1]

The main event featured a KSW Lightweight Championship bout between current champion (also a current two-time KSW Featherweight Champion) Salahdine Parnasse and Marcin Held.[2] The bout was originally scheduled to headline at KSW 106 in May 2025, but Held withdrew from the event due to a rib injury.[3]

Albert Odzimkowski was slated to make his promotional return on this event, but before his opponent was announced, he was forced to withdraw due to an injury.[4]

A light heavyweight bout between former KSW Light Heavyweight Champion Ibragim Chuzhigaev and Sergiusz Zając was scheduled for this event.[5] However, Zając withdrew from the bout due to health reasons and was replaced by Maciej Różański.[6]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Performance of the Night: Salahdine Parnasse
  • Knockout of the Night: Arkadiusz Wrzosek, Wiktoria Czyżewska and Andi Vrtačić

Results

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Salahdine Parnasse (c) def. Marcin Held TKO (punches) 2 3:35 [a]
Heavyweight Arkadiusz Wrzosek def. Szymon Bajor KO (knee) 2 0:40
Women's Bantamweight Wiktoria Czyżewska def. Tamires Vidal TKO (body kick and punches) 1 4:10
Catchweight (212 lb) Ibragim Chuzhigaev vs. Maciej Różański NC (accidental eye poke) 2 1:35 [b]
Featherweight Piotr Kacprzak def. Wojciech Kazieczko Decision (majority) (28–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Middleweight Andi Vrtačić def. Mateusz Gola KO (head kick) 2 2:39
Welterweight Amaury Wako-Zabo def. Viktor Červinský Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Middleweight Konrad Rusiński def. Henry Fadipe Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–26, 30–27) 3 5:00
Lightweight Iras Khizriev def. Oleksandr Moisa Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the KSW Lightweight Championship.
  2. ^ Accidental eye poke rendered Różański unable to continue.

[7]

XTB KSW 115: Przybysz vs. Yakymenko

[edit]
XTB KSW 115: Przybysz vs. Yakymenko
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateFebruary 21, 2026
VenueRCS Lubin
CityLubin, Poland

XTB KSW 115: Przybysz vs. Yakymenko was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on February 21, 2026, at the RCS Lubin in Lubin, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's third visit to Lubin and first since KSW 98 in September 2024.[8]

A KSW Bantamweight Championship bout between current two-time champion Sebastian Przybysz and Vitalii Yakymenko headlined the event.[9]

Daniel Skibiński was originally scheduled to face Tymoteusz Łopaczyk in a welterweight bout at this event.[10] However, Łopaczyk withdrew from the fight due to a rib injury and was replaced by undefeated prospect Dawid Kuczmarski.[11]

Dawid Kasperski and Jordan Nandor were scheduled to meet in a light heavyweight bout.[12] However, Kasperski had to withdraw from the bout due to a knee injury and was replaced by Kacper Sochacki.[13]

In addition, a middleweight bout between Borys Dzikowski and Adrian Dudek was also scheduled for this event.[14] However, Dudek withdrew due to an injury and was replaced by Kacper Pakeltys.[15]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Mariusz Joniak vs. Karol Durszlewicz
  • Submission of the Night: Kristians Boguzs and Kacper Sochacki

Results

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Vitalii Yakymenko def. Sebastian Przybysz (c) Decision (split) (49–46, 47–48, 49–46) 5 5:00 [a]
Welterweight Kacper Koziorzębski def. Artur Szczepaniak Decision (majority) (28–28, 29–27, 29–27) 3 5:00 [b]
Featherweight Łukasz Charzewski def. Alioune Nahaye Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Welterweight Dawid Kuczmarski def. Daniel Skibiński Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Featherweight Josef Štummer def. Michał Domin Decision (unanimous) (29–27, 29–27, 29–27) 3 5:00 [c]
Middleweight Kacper Pakeltys def. Borys Dzikowski Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 30–26, 30–27) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Mariusz Joniak def. Karol Durszlewicz Decision (unanimous) (29–27, 29–28, 30–26) 3 5:00
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Light Heavyweight Kacper Sochacki def. Jordan Nandor Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:10
Lightweight Kristians Boguzs def. Kacper Fornalski Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 2:27
  1. ^ For the KSW Bantamweight Championship.
  2. ^ Szczepaniak deducted one point in round 3 for repeated low blows.
  3. ^ Štummer deducted one point before the fight due to missing weight (148 lb).

[16]

XTB KSW 116: Bartosiński vs. Fleminas

[edit]
XTB KSW 116: Bartosiński vs. Fleminas
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMarch 14, 2026
VenueArena Gorzów
CityGorzów Wielkopolski, Poland

XTB KSW 116: Bartosiński vs. Fleminas was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on March 14, 2026, at the Arena Gorzów in Gorzów Wielkopolski, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event marked the promotion's third visit to Gorzów Wielkopolski and first since KSW 104 in March 2025.[17]

A KSW Heavyweight Championship bout between current champion Phil De Fries and opponent to-be-announced was initially scheduled to headline this event.[18] However on February 5, it was announced that the fight has been moved to the April event instead.[19]

A KSW Welterweight Championship bout between current champion Adrian Bartosiński and Madars Fleminas headlined the event.[20]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Damian Piwowarczyk vs. Sergiusz Zając
  • Submission of the Night: Eva Dourthe
  • Knockout of the Night: Damian Piwowarczyk

Results

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight Adrian Bartosiński (c) def. Madars Fleminas Decision (split) (48–47, 45–50, 48–47) 5 5:00 [a]
Light Heavyweight Damian Piwowarczyk def. Sergiusz Zając TKO (punches) 2 1:22
Middleweight Bartosz Kurek def. Tomasz Romanowski Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Bartosz Leśko def. Bartosz Szewczyk Decision (unanimous) (30–26, 30–25, 30–26) 3 5:00
Women's Strawweight Eva Dourthe def. Ewelina Woźniak Submission (armbar) 2 4:18
Lightweight Kacper Formela def. Krzysztof Mendlewski Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Lightweight Oleksandr Moisa def. Wojciech Kawa TKO (arm injury) 1 2:44
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Middleweight Damian Mieczkowski def. Maksymilian Kowalski TKO (punches) 3 1:58
Bantamweight Andrzej Karkula def. Dominik Mazur Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:31 [b]
  1. ^ For the KSW Welterweight Championship.
  2. ^ Mazur was deducted one point before the fight due to him missing weight (139 lb).

[21]

XTB KSW 117: Pawlak vs. Khalidov

[edit]
XTB KSW 117: Pawlak vs. Khalidov
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateApril 18, 2026
VenueArena COS Torwar
CityWarsaw, Poland

XTB KSW 117: Pawlak vs. Khalidov was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on April 18, 2026, at the Arena COS Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a KSW Middleweight Championship bout between current champion Paweł Pawlak and former two-time champion (also former KSW Light Heavyweight Champion) Mamed Khalidov.[22]

A KSW Heavyweight Championship bout between current champion Phil De Fries and Marcin Wójcik served as the co-main event.[23]

A heavyweight bout between Štefan Vojčák and Arkadiusz Wrzosek was scheduled at the event.[24] However, Wrzosek withdrew from the fight due to a rib injury, so the bout was canceled.[25]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Tobiasz Le vs. Sebastian Decowski
  • Submission of the Night: Phil De Fries
  • Knockout of the Night: Luka Vrtačić

Results

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Middleweight Paweł Pawlak (c) def. Mamed Khalidov TKO (elbows) 4 4:59 [a]
Heavyweight Phil De Fries (c) def. Marcin Wójcik Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:08 [b]
Featherweight Daniel Rutkowski def. Oleksii Polishchuk Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Middleweight Andi Vrtačić def. Albert Odzimkowski TKO (punches and elbows) 1 4:54
Bantamweight Marcello Morelli def. Werlleson Martins Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–26) 3 5:00
Lightweight Hugo Deux def. Welisson Paiva TKO (elbows) 2 4:59
Middleweight Luka Vrtačić def. Jacek Gać TKO (knee and punches) 1 0:45
Preliminary card (YouTube)
Bantamweight Tobiasz Le def. Sebastian Decowski Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–26) 3 5:00
Featherweight Nacim Belhouachi def. Jan Mašek Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the KSW Middleweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the KSW Heavyweight Championship.

[26]

XTB KSW 118: Kuberski vs. Michalski

[edit]
XTB KSW 118: Kuberski vs. Michalski
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMay 16, 2026
VenueKalisz Arena
CityKalisz, Poland

XTB KSW 118: Kuberski vs. Michalski is an upcoming mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on May 16, 2026, at the Kalisz Arena in Kalisz, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event will mark the promotion's first visit to Kalisz, which will be the third city to hold in Greater Poland Voivodeship.[27]

An interim KSW Middleweight Championship bout between current interim champion Piotr Kuberski and Michał Michalski is scheduled to headline the event.[28]

An inaugural KSW Women's Bantamweight Championship bout between Wiktoria Czyżewska and Sara Luzar-Smajić is scheduled to take place at the event.[29]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Middleweight Piotr Kuberski (ic) vs. Michał Michalski [a]
Women's Bantamweight Wiktoria Czyżewska vs. Sara Luzar-Smajić [b]
Lightweight Marian Ziółkowski vs. Aymard Guih
Lightweight Valeriu Mircea vs. Roman Szymański
Welterweight Artur Szczepaniak vs. Adam Masaev
Welterweight Oskar Szczepaniak vs. Steven Krt
Light Heavyweight Cedric Lushima vs. Michał Dreczkowski
Light Heavyweight Dawid Kasperski vs. Aleksander Winiarski
Welterweight Konrad Rusiński vs. Tagir Machmudov
  1. ^ For the interim KSW Middleweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the inaugural KSW Women's Bantamweight Championship.

[30]

XTB KSW 119: Kaczmarczyk vs. Brichta

[edit]
XTB KSW 119: Kaczmarczyk vs. Brichta
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJune 20, 2026
VenueRadomskie Centrum Sportu
CityRadom, Poland

XTB KSW 119: Kaczmarczyk vs. Brichta is an upcoming mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on June 20, 2026, at the Radomskie Centrum Sportu in Radom, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event will mark the promotion's fifth visit to Radom and first since KSW 114 in January 2026.[31]

A KSW Featherweight Championship bout between current champion Patryk Kaczmarczyk and Leo Brichta is scheduled to headline this event.[32][33] The bout was originally scheduled to meet at KSW 108 in July 2025, but Kaczmarczyk withdrew due to a leg injury.[34]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Patryk Kaczmarczyk (c) vs. Leo Brichta [a]
Heavyweight Štefan Vojčák vs. Arkadiusz Wrzosek
  1. ^ For the KSW Featherweight Championship.

[35]

XTB KSW 120: Szpilka vs. Sakai

[edit]
XTB KSW 120: Szpilka vs. Sakai
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJuly 18, 2026
VenuePolsat Plus Arena
CityGdynia, Poland

XTB KSW 120: Szpilka vs. Sakai is an upcoming mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on July 18, 2026, at the Polsat Plus Arena in Gdynia, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event will mark the promotion's second visit to Gdynia and first since KSW 84 in July 2023, which also will be a celebration of the city's 100th anniversary.[36]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card (Canal+ / KSWTV)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight Artur Szpilka vs. Augusto Sakai

[37]
